hook.summary: Text overlay promising free gifts followed by a hand unlocking a cute bear-shaped heart.
hook.visual_action: A hand taps a bear holding a heart lock, which then bursts open with rewards.
hook.text_overlay: FREE GIFTS are waiting for you

scene_flow: Intro text overlay 'FREE GIFTS are waiting for you' over a floating island background.
A hand taps a bear-shaped heart lock to reveal hidden items.
A variety of cute, themed items and dragons pop out of the lock.
Final screen displays a collection of items with 'Play & Win' and 'Collect Them All!' text.
on_screen_text: FREE GIFTS are waiting for you
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy collecting cute aesthetics and relaxing merge-style puzzles.
